title: Packages & Deals
description: Create special offers by bundling room types with services and meal plans.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage packages. Please contact an administrator.

list.empty_state: No packages have been created yet.

add_modal.title: Create New Package
add_modal.description: Combine room types with services and meals to create an attractive offer.
add_modal.no_rate_plans_warning: You must have at least one room type defined before creating a package.

delete_dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete the '{{name}}' package. This action cannot be undone.

form.description_placeholder: Describe what makes this package special.
form.capacity_note: Based on selected room types (max capacity: {{maxCapacity}}).

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Please fill out all required fields: Name, Price, Number of Guests, and select at least one Room Type.
validation_error.nights_required: Number of Nights is required for a fixed-length package.
validation_error.guest_capacity: The number of guests ({{guestCount}}) exceeds the maximum capacity ({{maxCapacity}}) of the selected room types.

permission_denied.title: Permission Denied
permission_denied.description: You do not have permission to perform this action.

save_success.title: Success
save_success.add_description: New package has been created successfully.

save_error.title: Error
save_error.description: Could not save the package. Please try again.

delete_success.title: Package Deleted
delete_success.description: The package has been successfully deleted.
